'''Ratri Tane''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scientist/Legends|researcher]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] who worked for the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He stole files from the Techno Union related to a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] prototype and was rescued by two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named [[Ylenic It'kla]] and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]]<ref name="Elusion Illusion">{{InsiderCite|66|Elusion Illusion}}</ref> took Tane into hiding to keep him safe and assumed his identity<ref name="TCSWE" /> during the [[Mission to Corellia (Clone Wars)|Mission to Corellia]]. Halcyon's background while posing as Tane included having a wife and a child.<ref name="Elusion Illusion" />
